description: Assign all nodes in the range to the group with the name s1 . Use of the group logic is described in Groups . A node may only belong to one group in a given slot. Assigning a node to a new group in that slot will cause it to be removed from its current group assignment. The structure node list command lists the existing node group names. The node groups can be displayed with the Shell , Geogrid and Liner plot items by choosing the Label: Group of Node attribute.

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: If supplied, the slot s2 keyword assigns the group to slot s2 ; if omitted, the group is assigned to the slot named Default .

keywords.name: remove
keywords.description: Remove all nodes in the range from the group named s . If no slot is specified, then that group will be removed from all slots in which it is found.
